name: Omega Luma : The First Battle
short_description: Fight and Survive. The destiny that awaits you will affect you and the entire world.
detailed_description:
The planet Vega is under fire..

A young man opens his eyes on a sky island belonging to our world by chance. His name is Lucas..We start a journey where we question ourselves, try to survive and meet new people in this sky island where everything starts again. Our hope and warrior spirit will accompany us..

Omega Luma comes to the world from the middle of the darkness and aims to destroy the end of all races like the planet Vega..Lucas must reach the tree of life..He must collect his memory and destroy the Omega Luma scourge..

But this is never that easy a task..We may even lose our closest friends in this cause..

Who knows?

Key Features

  • Inventory System

  • Survival System

  • Many Side Quests

  • Fluid Scenario

  • Crafting System

  • Equipment

  • Resource Gathering

  • Character Traits (Health, Energy...)

  • Farming (planting seeds, growing plants/fruits, hoeing, watering)

  • Farm Animals (eating, breeding, producing)

  • Wild Animal Behavior (wandering, escaping, chasing)

  • Hunting and Fishing

  • Food and cooking

  • NPC Shop to Buy/Sell Items

  • Combat (Attack and HP)

  • Item Durability and Food Deterioration

  • Storage Boxes (Crates)

  • Pets (Chasing, Attacking and Digging Behavior)

  • Horseback Riding

  • Save/Load System

  • Interactive Map

Art

  • Animated Characters (Male and Female)

  • Animated Animals (cow, sheep, chicken, pig, deer, bear, squirrel, bird...)

  • Basic material (wood, grass, rock, straw...)

  • Gathering tools (hoe, scythe, axe, pickaxe, fishing rod, ...)

  • Food (fruits, apples, nuts, meat, fish, ...)

  • Cooked food (tacos, popcorn, bread...)

  • Structures (fences, barbecue, safe...)

  • Environment (trees, bushes, rocks, ground patterns...)

  • Agricultural products (strawberries, zucchini, peppers, tomatoes, wheat...)

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Bulgarian, Danish, Indonesian, Dutch, Finnish, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Polish, Hungarian, Norwegian, Romanian, Russian, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Greek, Czech, Swedish
*languages with full audio support
